title: High-Risk and War-Like Zones. LMAs are directed to comply with the
content: 57 requirements/entitlements for their seafarers passing through designated High-Risk and 58 War-like areas as determined by the International Bargaining Forum (IBF)/International 59 Transport Workers’ Federation (ITF). 60 61 57 Licensed Manning Agencies are likewise directed to respect a seafarer’s right to refuse 1 sailing in areas designated as High-Risk and War-like zones and comply with reportorial 2 obligations as prescribed by the Department. 3 4 5 Comprehensive and Integrated Public Education Program 6 7
